lint.output: 1 pre-existing warning in flow-canvas.tsx (known, documented in LEARNINGS.md)

notes: Users table has 'name' column (not 'full_name'). page.tsx maps name→full_name in userMap to match acceptance criteria. RLS policy 'users_select_own' (id = auth.uid()) limits results to current user's row for other-user entries; UUID prefix fallback handles those cases gracefully. Two-phase query: entries fetched first in Promise.all, then users fetched for unique user_ids.
